name: trade_customs_vendor_patch_silently_northpine_tru_loy
premise: A Trade & Customs response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving trade customs vendor patch silently northpine tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Mira Mensah
agents.identity: I am Mira Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in Trade & Customs when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Hector Kim
agents.identity: I am Hector Kim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Trade & Customs.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Mira Mensah must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Mira Mensah do?
